role: A small presentational control widget that lets the user switch between item-level 'units' and coarser thematic scale 'rungs' in a multi-scale projection view.
capabilities: Conditionally renders a rung ladder only when rungs exist
Renders a 'units' button that clears the active rung
Renders one button per rung, sorted descending
Highlights the currently active rung or units state via CSS class
Applies a stamped address attribute to the container
substance_why: The visible control and click wiring are implemented, but accessibility semantics, keyboard handling, rung labels, and URL query synchronization are absent.
interactions_present: Click a rung button calls setRung(r)
interactions_missing: Accessible names or aria-pressed/aria-current state for buttons
Rung value labels or tooltips explaining each scale
Focus management and visible focus indicators
performance_risks: Re-sorts the rungs array on every render with [...rungs].sort
Re-creates button elements and stamp spread on every parent re-render
No memoization for stable callbacks or sorted list
reuse_why: The core selection model and rung ordering are worth keeping, but the markup, accessibility, and state integration need to be rebuilt.
decomposition_hints: Separate URL/query rung state synchronization from the presentational ladder
Extract a generic segmented-control/ladder primitive from the rung-specific UI
Separate rung metadata (labels, descriptions, accessibility text) from raw numeric values
